LightningComponentBundle.description: Displays field change history with optional trend chart for tracked fields on any record.

property.name: fieldName
property.label: Field API Name
property.description: API name of the tracked field (e.g., IUW_Risk_Rating__c). Leave blank to show all field changes.

property.name: metricLabel
property.label: Metric Label
property.description: Display label for the metric (e.g., IUW Risk Rating)

property.name: maxRecords
property.label: Max Records
property.description: Maximum number of history records to display

property.name: showChart
property.label: Show Trend Chart
property.description: Display a trend line chart above the history table
